programme.title: World of Watersports Ep307: Cliff Diving, Kitefoiling and Waterski Jumping
programme.desc: This WOW episode features Red Bull Cliff Diving in an underground lake in Romania's famous Turda salt mine; the European Kitefoil Championships in Spain; and the Moomba Masters men’s and women’s waterski jumping in Melbourne, Australia.

programme.title: Blue World Ep505: Mayan Underworld - Yucatan, Mexico
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of Mexico’s Yucatan, Blue World explores remote cenotes in the jungle that were once used for Mayan rituals. Just reaching the surface of the water requires rappelling down from the forest above. But then, beneath the surface, we encounter strange alien life forms that live in total darkness, and the remains of humans and animal sacrifices from an ancient culture.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep406: Paddling Papua New Guinea
programme.desc: Among the numerous islands and atolls of Papua New Guinea, Nikki Gregg experiences traditional festivals, charged canoe races and embarks on an exploratory trip down a remote river.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep111: Aquabike World Championship Series Portimao, Portugal
programme.desc: The Grand Prix of Portugal continues with a focus on the Aquabike Runabout Division.

programme.title: Next Stop Ep204: Ixtapa, Mexico
programme.desc: Segments include swimming with Dolphins; sea kayaking; the Zihuatanejo Market; exploring a Coconut Plantation; clay tile making; Las Brisas Ixtapa and live music at Bandidos.

programme.title: Airtime Ep55: Kayaking Norway…Romancing The Rapids
programme.desc: The swollen waterways of Norway’s backcountry provide the challenge as a group of world-class kayakers take on Class 5 whitewater in this adventure of a lifetime. These pros seek out the most difficult lines and spectacular waterfalls set against the wild beauty that's Norway.

programme.title: Xplash Ep109
programme.desc: Xplash brings you amazing action in, on, and near water. In this episode, we’ll fly high with kiteboarder Kevin Langeree; take a look at what's being done to progress the sport of Hydro Flight; and start things off by kayaking from the top of a snow-covered mountain.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep307: Cliff Diving, Kitefoiling and Waterski Jumping
programme.desc: This WOW episode features Red Bull Cliff Diving in an underground lake in Romania's famous Turda salt mine; the European Kitefoil Championships in Spain; and the Moomba Masters men’s and women’s waterski jumping in Melbourne, Australia.

programme.title: Blue World Ep505: Mayan Underworld - Yucatan, Mexico
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of Mexico’s Yucatan, Blue World explores remote cenotes in the jungle that were once used for Mayan rituals. Just reaching the surface of the water requires rappelling down from the forest above. But then, beneath the surface, we encounter strange alien life forms that live in total darkness, and the remains of humans and animal sacrifices from an ancient culture.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep406: Paddling Papua New Guinea
programme.desc: Among the numerous islands and atolls of Papua New Guinea, Nikki Gregg experiences traditional festivals, charged canoe races and embarks on an exploratory trip down a remote river.

programme.title: Unraveling - Chris Benchetler
programme.desc: Progression means something different to everyone. To Chris Benchetler, progression means evolving as a professional skier, as an artist, and as a father. It means growth, unraveling expectations, and changes over time. It means simplicity, clarity, and freedom. Filmed by director Tyler Hamlet.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 9: Kristoffer Turdell
programme.desc: In Episode 9, we encounter skier Kristoffer Turdell, two-time champion of the freeride world. Join us for this special Black Crows documentary about the animal from Gallivare, Sweden. Directed by Nikolai Schirmer.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 10: Beau Fredlund
programme.desc: A yurt, 140 inhabitants in town, a door that opens on the northeast of Yellowstone National Park in Montana, a fireplace, a pair of skis, welcome to Beau's wild garden. a film by Nikolai Schirmer

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 11: The Jackson 9
programme.desc: Jackson Hole, Wyoming is home to some of the most epic skiing in North America. It is also home to a bunch of bohemian skiers nicknamed the Jackson 9. In Episode 11, we kick off Part One of our documentary series dedicated to these hobo shredders and beautiful souls. Directed by Nicolai Schirmer.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 12: Nikolai Schirmer
programme.desc: He is tall, handsome, smart, sensitive and on fire while on skis. Nikolai Schirmer, skier, bohemian-movie-maker, reveals himself in this black doc where his meandering path unfolds. An itinerary full of waves and mountains where we discover a man whose heart has progressively tuned in to the rhythm of nature.

programme.title: Snowflake
programme.desc: Witness the joys and wonders of nature through the eyes of Snowflake, an eccentric Swiss skier with a life philosophy just as beautiful and perfectly unique as his namesake.

programme.title: Arc’teryx Presents: Motherload
programme.desc: The hardest part of any adventure is getting out the door. Planning is tedious. Packing is time consuming. Once on-hill, everything falls into place. Follow pro skiers Izzy Lynch and Tessa Treadway as they carry the load of life changing events and the love of their children into the mountains.

programme.title: The Ghost Ski Resorts - Fortress
programme.desc: Deep in the Rockies stands Fortress Mountain. From the late 1960s through the 1980s, this landmark ski area buzzed with activity. Today, it is a quiet thing of abandoned beauty. Skiers Mark Abma and Callum Pettit explore the past and ponder the future of this once iconic Alberta destination.

programme.title: The Ghost Ski Resorts - Ski Rio
programme.desc: In January 2000, Ski Rio closed one night. The resort has remained dormant ever since. It’s no stretch to compare Ski Rio’s snow covered lodgings to the Overlook Hotel in the cult classic thriller The Shining. Just like in the film, the innkeeper Joe Musich admits his job can get a little spooky.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 13: The Groomer Crow - Bernie Rosow
programme.desc: Do you despise your office job? If so, Episode 13 offers the truth, the way, and the light. Bernie Rosow could neither consider a life without skiing, nor skiing without the freedom of skiing. Now a snowcat operator, his night shift allows him to solve the equation and to freeski every day, freely.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 14: Tony Deano - Ski Bums Forever
programme.desc: In Episode 14, we honor our friends Tony Stadler and Deano Dacas. Before Black Crows was ever conceived, we were skiing for years with these two. And we will keep on skiing with them, whatever happens. We are the ski bum crows brotherhood forever.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 15: Gabriella Palko
programme.desc: Gabby Palko is living what many skiers would call a dream life. From her sailboat in the Port of Valdez, she is able to ski the Alaskan mountains as often as she likes. In this emotional documentary, she connects the dots between the two parts of her life, broken by the long illness of her father.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Ep 16: Mustafa Ceylan
programme.desc:
a skier's journey from soccer prodigy to falling in love with the ski experience A Swiss crow of Kurdish descent, necessarily multilingual and multiple, Moustique (French for “mosquito”) is a relentless lover of skiing. Having fun is the most important thing for this skier who only fell in love with skiing at the age of 15 but whose passion has grown more intense every day since. Moustique falls a lot but as he says, "that's how you learn". A true skibum, dedicated and single minded.
directed by : Jules Guarneri Benoît Goncerut produced by : Camille Jaccoux filmed and edited by : Jules Guarneri color grading : Julien Roserens audio mix : Marc Staedler

programme.title: The Black Crows - Ep 17: Michael “Bird” Shaffer
programme.desc:
Bird's story is a patchwork, fragments and colorful stages that, in retrospect, mark out a journey still in motion. As everything is a cycle, and for this winged animal, it all comes back to the source, as he does himself every summer, back in Twisp (Washington), in the hilly land of his childhood.
Born into an atypical family, a fighter pilot father who left everything behind to follow his wife to a hippie project in the hills of Washington State, Michael Shaffer was raised free and happy, close to nature. Those were also hard and frugal years, which forged an iconoclastic character but above all one of unlimited freedom. Whether he skis, flies or speaks, Bird radiates this independence, this quiet sovereignty, of one who has no ties and is content with little. He is happy to sleep on a sofa if the skiing is good and to drink water, as long as, the party goes on.
In this new black doc, we fly in the wake of the rare bird, this original crow who has been skiing the chevron since the very beginning, in a unique and unbridled sensory flashback, from the chicken coop to the dance floor.
additional thanks to Shane Wilder and the Stevens Pass Crew, Logan Sheppard-Bird the kid stunt-double and Alex Bosco for the conceptualizaton and additional cinematography. As well as all the fine-feathered shredder friends out there kaw kaw

programme.title: The Black Crows Presents: Wavy 2
programme.desc: After filming WAVY, director Nikolai Schirmer promised himself that he would never set foot on a ship again. Find out how he ended up off the coast of Svalbard with an excited rookie, a contemptuous captain, and a reformed drug addict, in this thrilling and often comical ski adventure documentary.

programme.title: The Black Crows Presents: La Sentinelle - The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Bruno Compagnet and Camille Jaccoux are friends and co-founders of Black Crows, the iconic ski brand, and La Sentinelle, the renown ski touring event. Two passionate practitioners in conversation, always seeking the wild, beautiful, and natural side of the mountain.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 1 - LAAX
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes with Absinthe Films and the legendary professional snowboarders Nicolas Müller and Wolfgang Nyvelt as they score epic powder at Laax Resort in Switzerland. Nicolas shows the crew around his home terrain, hitting up big hits and dreamy powder fields.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 2 - LAAX
programme.desc: In episode 2 of the Absinthe Films Flipside series, Nicolas Müller and Wolfgang Nyvelt continue exploring Nicolas’ backyard, the Laax Resort in Switzerland. With snow this deep, the mountain is an endless playground.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 3 - LAAX
programme.desc: Snowboarders always have secret stashes. This is especially true for Nicolas Müller. Watch as the Laax local takes Wolle Nyvelt to his favorite spots on the mountain. If you like perfect jumps high above the clouds, powder landings, frontside 1080s, and beautiful sunsets, this episode is for you.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 4 - ARLBERG
programme.desc: In 2012, snowboarder Danny Kass captured his debut part with Absinthe Films. To begin, Kass met up with Eric Jackson in Gigi Rüf’s hometown of Arlberg, Austria. While there, a war broke out between the film crew and the locals. Watch as Gigi steps in to keep the peace.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 5 - ARLBERG
programme.desc: Danny Kass, Gigi Rüf, and Wolle Nyvelt meet up in Arlberg, Austria. The crew spends the day fine-tuning their jump and bagging a perfect bluebird session. Danny puts down his first 720 of the year. Gigi takes a heavy slam trying backside double corks. But wait, there’s more! Drama ensues!

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 6 - ST. LUC
programme.desc: The Absinthe Films crew scores great weather, perfect snow, and no shortage of terrain options in St. Luc, Switzerland. Young guns Pat Burgener and Mat Schaer send it during a double cork session. Sylvain Bourbousson, Lucas Debari and Mat tackle more natural kickers and lines.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 7 - SAAS FEE
programme.desc: The superhuman Danny Kass and legendary Nicolas Müller reunite with the Absinthe Films crew in Switzerland. From the word “GO!,” the guys score epic powder conditions. Nico goes off slashing. Danny locks down the biggest backflip of his life.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 8 - SAAS FEE
programme.desc: In this episode of Flipside, Danny Kass flips a coin in Saas Fee. Tails he stays in Switzerland. Heads he goes home. Switzerland it is! Now on a solo mission, Kass stacks clips for the cameras of Absinthe Films director Patrick Armbruster. This is Danny Kass at his best.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Resonance
programme.desc: Resonance stands as a defining Absinthe Films classic, shot across Japan, Switzerland, and Alaska. Featuring Gigi Rüf, Nicolas Müller, Lucas Debari, Danny Kass, Annie Boulanger, Scotty Lago, Bode Merrill, and more in peak form.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 4: Horsewomen
programme.desc: This week Ride celebrates three extraordinary horsewomen and the captivating connection they have with their equine friends. We showcase exhebition work from American dressage star Sabine Schut-Kery, experience life through a lens with Poland’s fine art horse photographer Katarzyna Okrzesik-Mikolajek, and witness the holistic approach to healing in South West England with renowned trainer Connie Cox.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 5: Heroes Healers
programme.desc: This week Ride exercises military precision with the mounts of the Household Cavalry at the British Army’s London Barracks, and sees second chances given to troubled residents at Achterhoek horse shelter in the Netherlands. We’re in the back seat with Polish driving expert Piotr Mazurek and catch up with this year’s Longines FEI Rising Star Award winner, Germany’s Greta Busacker.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Night Sky
programme.desc: Enjoy a calming nature video featuring an enchanting autumn forest at night, soothing sounds of wind, owls, and birds, combined with soft ambient music for deep relaxation and restful sleep.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Landscape
programme.desc: Experience Iceland like never before with breathtaking aerial views! From glaciers to waterfalls, this amazing video offers a relaxing way to admire Iceland's natural beauty.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Nature Walks
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the calming beauty of Hawaii’s Tropical Botanical Garden, where diverse tropical flora and the gentle sounds of nature transport you to a peaceful, serene world.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: In 2015 Audi presented a facelift for their city racer A1. We put this compact to the test. Also: it's a tough competition in the compact class, and Renault and Peugeot also want a piece of the pie. We compared the Renault Twingo and the Peugeot 108.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The BMW M3 and the Mercedes-AMG C63, the top models of the two iconic manufacturers, are in eternal competition. With the Lexus RC F, a competitor from Japan is lurking. Is the Japanese exotic a threat to the German competition?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Aston Martin Vanquish is timeless and carries the strongest engine of the British brand under its hood. Also: Arden gave a Jaguar a power treatment and transformed the F-Type R to their Arden AJ23. And: the Morgan AR P4 roadster.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: The Blacktrail by PG Bikes is the fastest and lightest E-bike in the world, but also the most expensive. What's behind this exciting power package from Regensburg, Germany? Also: is BMW's new flagship bike, the K 1600 GT with 6 cylinders really worth its price and is it able to stand up to the competition by Honda, Kawasaki and Benelli?

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Whether taking it easy and cruising, or firing it up and drifting - trikes, scooters and three-wheeled bike conversions all have their own charm and driving dynamics, especially the trikes. We take a closer look at four rather exotic motorcycles: the Rewaco RF1 Turbo, Piaggio's MP3 and bike conversions for the Suzuki 800 Intruder and the Triumph Rocket III Touring.

programme.title: Go Green!
programme.desc: There’s no need for the Mercedes-Benz SLS AMg E-Cell to hide behind its fossil fuel counterpart. Also: BMW went new ways with their E-Mini. We took a closer look at this compact electric car. And: the Chevy Volt and the Opel Ampera.

programme.title: Go Green!
programme.desc: The IAA, in Frankfurt, germany, is one of the largest motor shows in the world. In 2012 compact electric cars, hybrid vans and futuristic concept cars started to play a more crucial part. Part 1 of 2.

programme.title: Made in...
programme.desc: Autonomous driving is seen as the future of mobility. Assistance systems help drivers overtaking other cars, check if there’s another car in the driver’s blind spot or warn the driver to take a break when he shows signs of fatigue.

programme.title: Made in...
programme.desc: What happens to car models that were designed in a thriving market but are launched as final products in times of market crisis? We accompanied the development history of a new BMW model, which starts with a design pitch.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.desc: Mylene Gomera and Saif Hattawi invite car freaks from the Middle East to show off their souped-up vehicles on the "Walk" at Jumeirah Beach in Dubai. In this episode, a Chevrolet Camaro competes against a Mercedes SLS AMG.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.desc: If you like souped-up and luxuriously equipped vehicles, Jumeirah Beach in Dubai is the place to be. There, the cars are judged and there is also something to win. This episode features a BMW X5 and a Mercedes SLK 230.

programme.title: Superman Show
programme.desc: A group of scientists discover an ancient dinosaur frozen in ice in Siberia. The "arctic giant" is brought to Metropolis to be displayed is the museum. Superman comes to the rescue after Lois gets assigned to cover to new exhibit.

programme.desc: Superman fights train robbers trying to steal a billion dollars worth of gold.

programme.title: A Day At DIBS
programme.desc: Dubai International Boat Show, the most trusted and established marine industry exhibition in the Middle East. Despite misconceptions claiming luxury yachts to be the main attraction in this event, the DIBS offer a much wider variety of expositions on nautical news, sports and lifestyle. It differs from other shows as it has a more exclusive clientele and many professionals of this world are yearning to come.You will adventure into one of Dubai’s most prestigious shows featuring the latest releases of yachts and boats from both local and international builders together with the innovations in marine equipment and accessories.Discover all its secret gems with Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Preview
programme.desc: Since it was first set up back in 2014, the GC32 Racing Tour has become one of the most sought after for those who enjoy sailing at its finest and fastest. The 2021’s season again proved why the world’s top professional and amateurs love this tour!After a challenging 2020, when the Tour was cancelled, it finally returned better than ever and made 2021 a year to remember. Through the season, the four stops offered nail-biting action in breath taking venues that brought the best out of these dynamic and fast one design foiling catamarans.The level of expectation and the anticipation was extremely high when the owner-driver and commercially-backed professional teams were about to hit again the water and both the organizers and the participants proved that it was worth waiting for the comeback. So let’s remember the most notable moments of what was a fascinating season full of top-level sailing battles in some crystal clear blue waters.

Here, more than 200 Classic and modern yachts sail side by side in the golden Saint Tropez to win this delightful competition.

programme.title: City of Vultures 3
programme.desc: Richard joins in the drug trade, as advocates for reform urge him to change. G attempts to raise his son on Chicago's violent south side.

programme.title: A Gun for Jennifer
programme.desc: A woman comes to New York City from Ohio to escape an abusive husband and gets entangled with murderous female vigilantes who prey on abusive men.

programme.title: A Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Death of A Ghost Hunter
programme.desc: Based on true events, a ghost hunter Carter Simms is paid to conduct a paranormal investigation of a suspected haunted house. Along with a cameraman, a reporter, and a spiritual advocate, she embarks on a three night journey into terror.

programme.title: Blood Punch
programme.desc: A young man breaks out of rehab to follow a mysterious girl into an easy drug score. But when she lures him to an isolated cabin, their simple love triangle quickly descends into a mind-blowing cycle of carnage and mayhem with no escape.

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning information about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition wreaks havoc on their forgotten coal mining town.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E25 - Kate The Making Of A Modern Queen
programme.desc: A look at the Duchess of Cambridge's journey from being an everyday young woman to becoming a future queen, and what her evolution signifies for the royal family.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Uncharted - S01:E12 - The Last Hunters
programme.desc: Arctic Pt3. The Inuit take Jim and Corey on their last adventure together. Jim finds inspiration from empty stretches of broken ice and the people who live off it.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E03 - Chasing The Big One
programme.desc: Montana wardens spend a week tracking the killer of two out-of-season deer; anonymous tips and eye witness accounts keep the wardens hot on a trail filled with many twists and turns.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E04 - Buggying Out
programme.desc: Fourth of July weekend in Silver Lake State Park is a non-stop party; Michigan conservation officers help patrol the park during this busy time and make keeping the peace their number one priority.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S01:E02 - Return To The Moon
programme.desc: The Moon, our closest celestial companion. Our indispensible dance partner through the cosmos. Lighting our night sky and gently tugging at our shores. Few have walked on her surface, though her allure remains strong, once again we are glancing her way with reThe Newed interest and with a view to return very soon.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S01:E03 - The Inner Worlds
programme.desc: They orbit between us and our Star, the inner worlds; hidden within the sun's glare often only visible at sunrise or sunset. Venus the first and brightest star in the evening sky, and Mercury fleeting across the solar disk. They are half of our solar system's terrestrial planets and yet as we look at our companions they are posing more questions than answers.

programme.title: The Luxury Travel Show - S01:E07 - Uga Bay, Sri Lanka and Istanbul
programme.desc: The Luxury Travel Show heads to the idyllic resort of Uga Beach in Sri Lanka for some unusual fine dining locations, with tall tables in the swimming pool and dug-out sunken tables in the sand. Then it’s off to Istanbul with a stay in one of the city’s best hotels - which has been transformed from a derelict tobacco factory into a palace fit for royalty.

programme.title: The Luxury Travel Show - S01:E08 - Grand Cayman and Toledo
programme.desc: Things hot up in this episode of The Luxury Travel Show as we head to the Caribbean island of Grand Cayman to a small town where visitors can literally send loved ones a postcard from Hell. The temperature dips only slightly in Toledo for a safari trip in Spain, with sunset drives, horse riding and clay pigeon shooting.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E13 - William And Kate One Year On
programme.desc: William and Catherine got married in a fairytale ceremony on April 29, 2011, with more than two billion people tuning in and celebrations happening all around the world.

programme.title: Farewell Halong
programme.desc: For generations, the Nguyen family has lived on and off the water amid breathtaking natural scenery. Now they are threatened with forced resettlement.

programme.desc: A lesbian bachelorette’s night out with "the guys", including, alas, her future sperm donor. A mumblecore comedy on a raft.

Following a near death escape, he returns to Montreal and falls hard for the woman of his life who unfortunately craves only his cooking but not his loving. Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max, impatient, wants to know about his sister, Julia. Their plan is to exchange her for Ezequiel and then kill him. In a voice message Julia tells him the time and day of the exchange and Max will accompany him.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Carmen accuses Luis and Augusto of trafficking minors. Ricardo is cornered: on the one hand he feels he cannot maintain a relationship with four women at the same time, but on the other hand there is the million dollars lost. Gertrudis celebrates that the success in the drug trafficker's trial opens the door for all of them to trust her Legal Office. Alberto is leaving the Corona house when Guillermo intercepts him on his motorcycle; threatening, he lifts the visor of his helmet and is exposed to his rival.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Alberto asks for police protection for his home and family; Omar comes to the conclusion that Claudio is indeed involved in his brother's death - Patricia does not understand why Gertrudis insists on condemning her daughter to a relationship with a troglodyte like Pablo - Alberto tells his mother about the encounter he had with the hitman who killed his father; Gertrudis feigns anger and surprise, immediately calling Claudio to alert him about the situation

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: After Pastora fell asleep, Elisenda advises Raul not to let his private life go down with that of Lara Portillo.
Illis asks Cirilo if Clara Ines is his daughter.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Carlos Raúl tells Mauricio that, despite being discovered by Adriana in his plan to capture César, he will not lose heart in conquering the young woman's heart.

programme.title: EN PRIMERA PLANA
programme.desc: Programa que conecta al público con temas de actualidad global , ofreciendo una visión informada de la "Aldea Global."

programme.desc: Programa periodístico que presenta entrevistas exclusivas y análisis de temas actuales, manteniendo al público informado al momento.

programme.desc: Programa que explora fascinantes destinos turísticos y culturas diversas, ofreciendo recomendaciones y experiencias únicas para los amantes de los viajes.

programme.title: OLASYVIENTOS
programme.desc: Programa dinámico y emocionante dedicado a los amantes de los deportes, el automovilismo, el motociclismo y la aventura.

programme.title: BODY AND PAINT SHOP
programme.desc: Programa dinámico y emocionante dedicado a los amantes de los deportes, el automovilismo, el motociclismo y la aventura.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Esperanza, sabe sobre Rosa Blanco. Gregorio y Julia, fingen ante la familia, pero continúan encontrándose. Los Aragón siempre en guerra por la muerte de Marcos.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Gregorio necesita escapar con Julia. Camila esta negada al amor, Jeli quiere que admita lo que siente por Max y ella le cuenta la razón del rechazo. En el orfanato habla con el Padre Tiziano y la Madre Isabel sobre Rosa Blanco; y cree que tiene que ver en este asunto y que es El Doliente.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max piensa que Camila lo rechazó por Roberto. En confesión con el Padre Tiziano, le aconseja que le cuente toda la verdad a Max, pero ella teme que Roberto la denuncie por asesina. Julia y Gregorio vuelven a encontrarse.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila es atropellada por un desconocido que le advierte que deje de buscar a Rosa Blanco. Esto la inquieta y acude a Max pero el le dice que no lo involucre más en este asunto. Todos temen el regreso de Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max y Ezequiel se enfrentan por Camila. Astrid trata de manipular a Roberto para sacarle información a cambio de dinero. Max acusa a Camila de prostituta y decide sacarla de su vida. El regreso de Rosa Blanco es traumático.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max decide enfrentar a Roberto, y cede a la seducción de Astrid, pero no por amor sino por despecho. Durante una cena familiar, Ezequiel brinda por Octavia, pero expresa su intención de casarse con otra mujer. Camila sabe que su madre regresará.

programme.title: Utopía 7
programme.desc: En un mundo postapocalíptico, una pandilla de jóvenes rebeldes lucha contra los mecanismos de alta tecnología de un sistema informático definitivo que había sido encargado por un grupo de élite para restablecer el orden y el equilibrio.

programme.title: Expediente 53
programme.desc: Esta es una historia de misterio y acción en la ciudad de Bryan Texas el comandante Gatel pide la ayuda del FBI ya que hay muchos desaparecidos, y asesinatos en la ciudad. Los agentes Gutiérrez, Bracho y Miravalle del FBI le comentan al comandante Gatel que ellos sospechan que puede ser obra de una secta satánica y que el líder es un demonio de nombre Abal que está en el cuerpo de una bella mujer de nombre Lilly.

programme.title: 72 Horas Para Morir
programme.desc: Su madre lo dejo en manos de su padre siendo un niño y el lo preparo para ser un gatillero y hacerse cargo del territorio de Texas, por eso lo apodan el Texano. Un día en la calle se encuentra con una mujer y ella le adivina su futuro, le dice que tiene 72 horas para morir... el texano no lo cree pero algo muy malo esta por suceder.

programme.title: El Tercer Deseo
programme.desc: Eugenio, un corredor de bienes raíces despierta en una esquina de la ciudad con una descomunal borrachera y descubre cerca una desportillada tetera de metal. La toma y manosea a ver si es de plata y, de pronto, se le aparece el espectro de un duende que le sugiere formule tres deseos. El genio desaparece sin dar oportunidad al tercer deseo. Mas tarde, descubre que los deseos le han sido concedidos pero de forma equivocada. La vida de Eugenio se complica, solo anhela reencontrar la tetera abandonada y pedir el tercer deseo.

programme.title: El Retorno
programme.desc: Una extraña mujer mantiene expectante y desorientado al espectador cuando a diario habla con su hija y la presencia de su hija no aparece en ningún momento. Una historia no previsible que juega al despiste, por lo que, hay que esperar hasta el final para saber lo que está pasando la protagonista.

programme.title: ¡Ni Te Me Acerques!
programme.desc: Él solo tenía que cuidar el hotel y teclear su novela, como Jack Nicholson en “El Resplandor”, pero de buen rollo. Y Llega la cuarentena y se queda le pilla en el Hotel Balneario de Ariño haciendo frente a la paranoia general, el acoso de las fuerzas del orden, las videollamadas de su novia, su madre y del conspiranoico Javi... Todos nos aburrimos mucho en el primer confinamiento. Juan no.

programme.title: El Sonido de los Tulipanes
programme.desc: En Buenos Aires durante la crisis del 2001, Marcelo un escritor devenido en periodista, debe volver sobre los últimos pasos de su padre Tonio un consagrado intelectual de quien se encuentra profundamente distanciado cuando muere en condiciones extrañas. De la mano de Carolina la ex secretaria de su padre, Marcelo se sumerge en un mundo oscuro lleno de violencia y ambiciones de poder enfrentándose a “El Loco” Bertolini. Pero el peligro no solo lo acechará a él sino también a los suyos. ¿Podrá Marcelo encontrar los verdaderos motivos de la muerte de su padre?

programme.title: El Desertor
programme.desc: Luego de ser reclutado para el servicio militar y ante los abusos de su jefe inmediato, el Subteniente Montilla, Julián escapa del cuartel, lo que provoca una feroz persecución por parte de Montilla, quien se ha enamorado de Sagrario y hará todo lo posible para separar a los jóvenes.

programme.title: El Tercer Deseo
programme.desc: Eugenio, un corredor de bienes raíces despierta en una esquina de la ciudad con una descomunal borrachera y descubre cerca una desportillada tetera de metal. La toma y manosea a ver si es de plata y, de pronto, se le aparece el espectro de un duende que le sugiere formule tres deseos. El genio desaparece sin dar oportunidad al tercer deseo. Mas tarde, descubre que los deseos le han sido concedidos pero de forma equivocada. La vida de Eugenio se complica, solo anhela reencontrar la tetera abandonada y pedir el tercer deseo.

programme.title: El Retorno
programme.desc: Una extraña mujer mantiene expectante y desorientado al espectador cuando a diario habla con su hija y la presencia de su hija no aparece en ningún momento. Una historia no previsible que juega al despiste, por lo que, hay que esperar hasta el final para saber lo que está pasando la protagonista.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.
